title: Sayonara End Roll (Short Douga)
titleNative: さよならエンドロール(short動画)
synonyms: さよならエンドロール ショートアニメーション
synopsis: Commemorative short animation between Eve and kawa for the release of the album UnderBlue, set to the song Sayonara End Roll.

title: My Milk Cup Cow
synopsis: Father tells his 4-year-old daughter Nunu that there's a cow at the bottom of her milk cup. Nunu believes him and drinks all of her milk, but there is no cow. Nunu gradually stops believing her father, who constantly tells her various lies. Graduate Work 2014, Tokyo University of the Arts, Graduate School of Film and New Media, Department of Animation (Source: Geidai Animation)

title: filz
synopsis: Short film by Masa Kudo

tags.name: Animals
tags.description: Prominently features animal characters in a leading role.

title: Ningyougeki
synopsis: Puppet-animated show made for elementary school students in the lower grades with the aim of teaching children life lessons and morals while also nurturing healthy imagination. It adapts a wide array of stories; originating from foreign folktales, comtemporary fairytales and classic books. The name originally was Puppet Show (人形劇) but in 1966 it was changed to "Ningyougeki" in hiragana.

tags.name: Educational
tags.description: Primary aim is to educate the audience.

tags.name: Kids
tags.description: Target demographic is young children.

tags.name: Puppetry
tags.description: Animation style involving the manipulation of puppets to act out scenes.

title: Turtle's Stroll
synopsis: One day, a pet turtle named Kamesuke decided to go out alone. It should have been all that he had hoped for and yet he couldn't help but feel like something was missing. (Source: Geidai Animation)

title: HOTTEST TOKYO
synopsis: Graduation work of Miho Kidoguchi at Tama Art University.

title: Stay with Me
titleNative: 湿らない 腐らない おいしく まろやか
synopsis: Now a grown woman, I sit on the train recollecting my childhood. That morning field baking in the sun. Making one bamboo-leaf boat after the other. The smoke from the fireworks spreading like a thick fog. And to those memories I say, “Welcome back.” Graduate Work 2019, Tokyo University of the Arts, Graduate School of Film and New Media, Department of Animation (Source: Geidai Animation)

title: here AND there
synopsis: Here and there, there and here. One early summer day, trivial incidents occur in three landscapes. 1st year work 2017, Tokyo University of the Arts, Graduate School of Film and New Media, Department of Animation. (Source: Geidai Animation)

title: Kakkun Café
synopsis: Kakuei Kakkun Tanaka is a superhero who hangs out with his friends. In his misadventures, he becomes prime minister of Japan, visits New York and prevents a nuclear war. (Source: The Anime Encyclopedia)

title: Okaimono Panda! (ONA)
synopsis: Streaming exclusive episodes of Okaimono Panda! .

title: The Idolm@ster SideM Wake Atte Mini! Specials
titleRomaji: The Idolm@ster SideM Wake Atte Mini! Specials
titleNative: アイドルマスター SideM　理由あってMini!
synopsis: Three new episodes of The iDOLM@STER SideM: Wake Atte Mini! bundled with the Blu-ray/DVD release.

tags.name: Chibi
tags.description: Features "super deformed" character designs with smaller, rounder proportions and a cute look.

title: To Heel
synopsis: These girls live by the law of heels. As painful as the codes may be, they're also the source of so many of their secret pleasures. Graduate Work 2016 by Madoka, Tokyo University of the Arts, Graduate School of Film and New Media, Department of Animation. (Source: Geidai Animation)

tags.name: Female Protagonist
tags.description: Main character is female.

tags.name: Bar
tags.description: Partly or completely set in a bar.

title: Mrs. KABAGOdZILLA
synopsis: ”Mrs. KABAGodZILLA had a daughter whose arms and legs were the spitting image of her own.” Mother and daughter were always together, but the mother's hospitalization makes the daughter remember the past, and think a little about what lies ahead. Graduate Work 2014, Tokyo University of the Arts, Graduate School of Film and New Media, Department of Animation. (Source: Geidai Animation)

title: BBOONG-UH CAFE Pilot
synopsis: One day, in a peaceful café, boong-uh bread BBOONG-UH appears! (Source: YouTube Description)

title: Conflicted
synopsis: Everyone has a sense of justice. The protagonist thinks her ideas are right and voices her opinions through protests for social justice. One day the demonstration turns violent. Maybe we could live in peace if self-righteousness were to disappear. (Source: Geidai Animation)

title: Chickip Dancers 2nd Season
titleNative: チキップダンサーズ　第2期
synopsis: Second season of Chickip Dancers.

title: It’s time for supper
synopsis: Playtime ends at the five o'clock chime. And there comes the indefinable time between vanishing playtime and dinner time at home. Graduate Work 2013, Tokyo University of the Arts, Graduate School of Film and New Media, Department of Animation. (Source: Geidai Animation)

title: Before Dawn
synopsis: One cold and damp morning, two weasels were wandering the quiet streets. They get separated at one point but are reunited. Just then, bells and alarms began to ring through the city, and dawn came. Graduate Work 2022, Tokyo University of the Arts, Graduate School of Film and New Media, Department of Animation. (Source: Geidai Animation)

title: minini Animation Series
synopsis: The anime centers on the LINE FRIENDS "minini" non-verbal palm-sized characters surviving in the human world.

title: Kuni-chan no Ikka Ranran
titleNative: 邦ちゃんの一家ランラン
synopsis: A short animation based on Kuniko Yamada's semi-autobiographical essay Ikka Ranran (一家ランラン), published in 1993. It released in theaters as part of Kin-chan no Cinema Jack (欽ちゃんのシネマジャック). Yamada narrated the film herself.

title: Kokoro no Catchball
synopsis: An educational anime about that teaches how to self reflect and communicate with empathy towards others.
